title: metastelma acerosum
intro: Metastelma acerosum, also known as the "hairy vine gloria", is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Metastelma acerosum include treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
